login.title: Login
login.subTitle: A single place for all your passwords
login.contactSupport: No PIN set: contact the assistance for account reactivation
login.noAccount: Don't you have an account yet?

index.title: Homepage
index.subTitle: Go ahead and forget your passwords, we will remember them for you.
index.noData: You haven't saved anything yet: as soon as you will save something, it will appear here

signup.title: Signup
signup.subTitle: Your data is so safe that even we can't see or recover it in any way, therefore the only thing we ask you is to remember our password
signup.usernameDesc: This will be your identifier, no one will have the same as yours
signup.emailDesc: Email will help us recognise you in case of account lock
signup.pwdDesc: Just remember this password and we will safeguard all the others for you
signup.secondPwdDesc: We are checking that you have inserted the right password you wanted
signup.invalidPwdLen: Password must be at least 8 characters long

recovery.title: Recovery
recovery.subTitle: A single place for all your passwords
recovery.noPin: No PIN set for this user
recovery.lockedPin: PIN locked: contact the assistance for PIN reactivation
recovery.lockedAccount: Account locked: contact the assistance for account reactivation
recovery.invalidNewPwd: The new password must not match the old one
recovery.pinMsg: Make sure to have set a PIN for the recovery, otherwise it will not be possible to reset the password

generator.title: Generator
generator.excludeLtGt: Exclude < and > characters

options.title: Options
options.errNewPwdSameAsOld: The new password must not match the old one
options.deletAccountMsg: The account elimination is irreversibile. Confirming the operation all the user's data will be eliminated and it will no longer be possible to recover them.
options.noPinMsg: WARNING: selecting this option, in case of password loss all the informations will be lost and it will not be possible to recover them
options.usePinMsg: Selecting this option, in case of password loss you will be able to reset it through your PIN. Moreover, it will be possibile to reset your PIN through your password
options.errNewPinSameAsOld: New PIN must not match the old one
